notableEvents.label: Oneil Cruz reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Oneil Cruz reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Willy Adames. Joey Bart to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Ryan O'Hearn GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan O'Hearn grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Bryce Eldridge. Brandon Lowe scores. Jared Triolo out at 2nd. Ryan O'Hearn out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Rafael Devers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rafael Devers grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Heliot Ramos out at 2nd. Rafael Devers out at 1st.
